changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Create the unified LLM usage ledger (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Per-workspace monthly LLM budget cap in USD; null = uncapped (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.onFailMessage: llm_usage_event missing — nothing to backfill into

changeSet.comment: Backfill the LLM usage ledger from agent_job (#1368)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO llm_usage_event (id, workspace_id, job_type, source_id, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, total_calls, cost_usd, occurred_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), j.workspace_id, j.job_type, j.id, j.llm_model, COALESCE(j.llm_total_input_tokens, 0), COALESCE(j.llm_total_output_tokens, 0), COALESCE(j.llm_cache_read_tokens, 0), COALESCE(j.llm_cache_write_tokens, 0), GREATEST(COALESCE(j.llm_total_calls, 1), 1), CAST(j.llm_cost_usd AS NUMERIC(12,6)), COALESCE(j.completed_at, j.created_at) FROM agent_job j WHERE (COALESCE(j.llm_total_calls, 0) > 0 OR j.llm_cost_usd IS NOT NULL) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM llm_usage_event e WHERE e.source_id = j.id);

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.onFailMessage: llm_usage_event missing — nothing to backfill into

changeSet.comment: Backfill the LLM usage ledger from chat_message.metadata (#1368)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO llm_usage_event (id, workspace_id, job_type, source_id, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, total_calls, cost_usd, occurred_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), t.workspace_id, 'MENTOR_TURN', m.id, NULLIF(COALESCE(m.metadata->>'model', ''), ''), COALESCE(floor((m.metadata->'usage'->>'input')::numeric), floor((m.metadata->>'inputTokens')::numeric), 0)::bigint, COALESCE(floor((m.metadata->'usage'->>'output')::numeric), floor((m.metadata->>'outputTokens')::numeric), 0)::bigint, COALESCE(floor((m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheRead')::numeric), floor((m.metadata->>'cacheReadTokens')::numeric), 0)::bigint, COALESCE(floor((m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheWrite')::numeric), floor((m.metadata->>'cacheWriteTokens')::numeric), 0)::bigint, 1, CAST(m.metadata->>'costUsd' AS NUMERIC(12,6)), m.created_at FROM chat_message m JOIN chat_thread t ON t.id = m.thread_id WHERE m.metadata IS NOT NULL AND (m.metadata->>'costUsd' IS NOT NULL OR m.metadata->'usage'->>'input' IS NOT NULL OR m.metadata->>'inputTokens' IS NOT NULL) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM llm_usage_event e WHERE e.source_id = m.id);

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.onFailMessage: config_audit_event entity_type CHECK already covers WORKSPACE_LLM_BUDGET
preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'ck_config_audit_event_entity_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%WORKSPACE_LLM_BUDGET%'

changeSet.comment: Admit WORKSPACE_LLM_BUDGET on the config-audit trail (#1368)
